project.name: talos-images
project.summary: Custom Talos Linux image composition repository for declaring system extensions and publishing metal install artifacts plus GHCR installer images.
goals: Declare the Talos system extension set used to build custom Talos images.
Build metal install artifacts and installer images from explicit Talos version and extension inputs.
Publish release and GHCR artifacts that downstream provisioning and upgrade systems can consume through documented references.
nonGoals: Own individual system extension implementations, Talos Linux upstream behavior, or Sidero imager internals.
Own cluster rollout orchestration, node upgrade sequencing, or Kubernetes workload safety policy.
Publish enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, org rulesets, rollout issue reconciliation, or shared CI and release policy.

owns.name: talos-image-extension-set
owns.description: The declared list of Talos system extension image references included in custom Talos image builds.

owns.name: talos-image-build-workflow
owns.description: GitHub Actions workflow that runs the Talos imager, publishes release artifacts, and pushes installer images.

owns.name: talos-image-artifact-surface
owns.description: GitHub Release and GHCR artifact references consumed by provisioning and upgrade workflows.

doesNotOwn: System extension implementation details owned by their producer repositories.
Talos Linux upstream behavior, Sidero imager internals, cluster rollout orchestration, or workload safety policy.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, rollout issue reconciliation, org rulesets, or shared workflow implementation.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode one cluster's rollout sequence, workload safety policy, or node upgrade procedure as hidden image-build behavior.
Do not consume sibling extension repositories through source paths instead of published image references.
Do not make this repository own extension implementation internals or downstream upgrade controllers.
Do not publish enterprise process policy from this repository instead of SylphxAI/doctrine.

generatedReferences.path: GitHub Releases and GHCR image metadata

delivery.deployPath: Main pushes and workflow dispatch run .github/workflows/build.yml to publish GitHub Release metal images and ghcr.io/sylphxai/talos-installer images.
delivery.productionProof: Image changes require workflow success, GitHub Release artifact readback, GHCR installer image readback, and install or upgrade smoke evidence in the intended Talos environment.

gaps.description: Add pull-request and merge-group validation for Talos image build inputs before full central admission.
Document release artifact, installer image, and Talos install or upgrade readback required for image changes.
Document how extension image references, Talos versions, and rollback compatibility are selected and verified.
